docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,488.58 FILED BY ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC AS TO DEFENDANT II MILLENNIUM INC./ESSEX SUPPER CLUB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT II MILLENNIUM INC./ESSEX SUPPER CLUB

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT II MILLENNIUM INC./ESSEX SUPPER CLUB $2,488.58 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,548.58 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT II MILLENNIUM INC./ESSEX SUPPER CLUB
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $795.00 AS TO DEFENDANT II MILLENNIUM INC./ESSEX SUPPER CLUB
